Do you want to work on projects that make a real difference for leading companies across
Australasia? Do you want to work in a place where you can call home, where you can get ahead in
your career without having to move on?
At Sandfield, we build smart software solutions for top brands, and we're looking for talented
developers to join our team. We're looking for more than just coders; we want innovators who can
bridge the gap between complex business needs and cutting-edge technology.
About Sandfield
We're a Kiwi-owned company that's been around since 1989. Our work facilitates high-
performance supply chains for Mainfreight, Qube, HW Richardson, and Booths, and keeps millions
of orders and data points flowing for Foodstuffs. It also manages business finances for Team
Global Express and Green Acres, helps fill seats on the Interislander for KiwiRail, looks after
security services for First Security and books parking spaces through ParkMate, plus so much
more.
We pride ourselves on being different from your typical tech company. At Sandfield, you will:
·Solve Real Business Problems: We don't just write code; we seek to understand the"why." A
key part of your role will be a deep understanding of business requirements to ensure our
solutions deliver maximum impact.
·Leverage Al for Innovation: We are evolving how we work by integrating Al tools to accelerate
development and create more inteligent business solutions for our clients.
· Interact Directly with Clients: Our developers deal directly with our clients. We spend just as
much time nurturing soft skills,like communication and business acumen, as we do helping you
become a coding "ninja."
· Join a Supportive Team: Our collaborative culture is at the centre of everything we do at
Sandfield, making it a pretty special place to work. We know this because people also don't
tend to leave; the average length of stay is more than five years.
Check out what our team have to say
Our tech stack
We primarily use the Microsoft stack to build web-based applications, with some opportunities for
mobile development. Full-stack experience is ideal, but not required. We'll support you in
developing your skills.
Requirements:
Required:
· Full-Stack Mindset: Solid experience building web applications using the Microsoft stack (C#,
.NET Core/WebAPI).
·Database Fundamentals: Comfortable designing and querying SQL Server databases.
Core Web Skills: A good grasp of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
